headline: Independence Day Finale (July 9-13): Free Lago Zancudo Bunker, 3X Stunt Races, Ocelot Jugular Podium
quickTake: 3X GTA$ and RP on the Stunt Race Series
Claim the free Lago Zancudo Bunker this week
Complete any Heist Finale for a GTA$1,000,000 bonus within 72 hours

items.label: 3X GTA$ and RP on the Stunt Race Series
2X GTA$, RP and Research Progress on Bunker Research Missions (Agent 14), plus 2X Research Speed

beginnerPath.label: Claim the free Lago Zancudo Bunker before July 13 — zero-cost entry into a passive-income business.
Log in for the free Lady Liberty Bucket Hat, and grab the free Firework Launcher and Musket from the Gun Van.
Stunt Races pay 3X GTA$ and RP this week — an easy grind if you need quick cash.
Win 2 Races for a GTA$100,000 bonus and a free jumpsuit — low effort, solid payout.
Skip the discounted MOC, Terrorbyte and aircraft until you have your first money-making property running.

locations.name: Maze Bank Foreclosures (in-game website)
locations.note: Claim via the in-game browser before the week ends.

locations.name: Quick Job menu
locations.note: Pause Menu → Online → Jobs → Quick Job → Race → Stunt.

locations.name: The Diamond Casino & Resort
locations.note: Spin the Lucky Wheel once per day.

locations.name: LS Car Meet
locations.note: Win the LS Car Meet Series two days in a row to claim it.

locations.name: Gun Van (rotating spot)
locations.note: Van icon appears on the map once you are close, or check daily.

locations.name: Lake Vinewood Estate
locations.note: Purple stopwatch icon on the map.

locations.name: North Chumash to Palomino Highlands
locations.note: Requires an HSW-upgraded vehicle (PS5 / Series X|S / PC Enhanced).

locations.name: Muscle In
locations.area: Enter via the yellow corona or Quick Job menu
locations.note: Premium entry fee, top 3 win big.
